title: Diffusion Models explained..
summary: Caleb Writes Code and Julia Turc explain diffusion models as a process and framework rather than a fixed architecture. The video covers the progression of diffusion, its strengths and weaknesses, implementation approaches like Diffusion Transformers (DiT), and the theory behind how diffusion works across various angles.
